description_long: This hot dog features a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, lightly browned bun. The sausage is generously topped with a wavy line of bright red ketchup, accompanied by visible slices of green pickles, white onions, and yellow mustard. The bun appears fluffy and slightly textured, cradling the toppings and sausage securely. The condiments are applied in a visually appealing, even manner, with the ketchup and mustard drizzled along the length of the sausage. The hot dog is unwrapped, with no visible packaging or tray, and the sausage ends protrude slightly from both sides of the bun. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a classic American street food hot dog.
description: A classic hot dog with a sausage in a soft bun, topped with ketchup, mustard, pickles, and onions. The condiments are neatly applied and the hot dog is unwrapped.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hot dog, with the sausage and condiments visible along the top and both ends of the sausage protruding from the bun.
description_view_1: Angled end view highlighting the rounded end of the sausage, the arrangement of condiments, and the bun's thickness.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bun's underside and the sausage, with condiments visible along the top.
description_view_3: Angled end view from the opposite side, showing the other end of the sausage and the layered condiments.
